purpose: Scan recent workspace activity and append useful observations to durable memory.
allowed_reads: workspace files needed to inspect recent changes
verification: If Date: target_date already exists, do not modify OBSERVATIONS.md.
If writing observations, use exact date header format Date: YYYY-MM-DD.
References to repository files must be paths relative to the workspace root.
Separate observations into High, Medium, and Low priority entries.
memory_policy: Capture only observations likely to be useful beyond the current task. Do not promote rules or garbage collect memory in this loop.
